hero.name: Andressa
hero.description: Creating modern digital solutions focused on quality, efficiency, and intuitive experiences that connect people and technology.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I am a software developer with experience in backend, frontend, automation, and RPA, focused on building efficient, scalable, and well-structured solutions. I enjoy turning ideas into functional digital products by combining solid logic, performance, and great user experience.
about.p2: I am constantly seeking new challenges that allow me to grow professionally, explore modern technologies, and contribute meaningfully to the success of projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
